reason: Verified agent message sending and response in QA test for agent QA-20260722-003603-ph6e
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Success. Page loaded with Gamut app showing sidebar with agents.
Step 2: Found and clicked "QA-20260722-003603-ph6e" agent in sidebar — Success. Navigated to agent detail page.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "idle" — Success. Status indicator shows "idle" in the agent header.
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Success. Message typed into input field and sent button clicked. Page navigated to chat session "Math Basics with QA Agent".
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Success. Response received in 35ms with agent status changing to "working" and back to "idle".
Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Success. Agent response clearly displays "4" with "Worked for 4s" metadata. Screenshot saved as response_screenshot.png.
